title: olearia lanata
intro: Olearia lanata, also known as woolly tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Native to New Zealand, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Olearia lanata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Olearia lanata include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
